query-mapping.description: List of permissions for a given user

query.name: command-user-permissions
query.comment: Get the list of permissions for a given user
query.sql: SELECT acl.id AS id, acl.workspace_id AS workspace_id, acl.entity_id AS entity_id, acl.writeable AS writeable, ent.name AS entity_type, perm.name AS permission FROM awa_email AS email INNER JOIN awa_user AS u on u.email_id = email.id INNER JOIN awa_acl AS acl ON acl.user_id = u.id INNER JOIN awa_permission AS perm ON acl.permission = perm.id INNER JOIN ado_entity_type AS ent ON acl.entity_type = ent.id WHERE email.email = :email
query.sql-count: SELECT COUNT(acl.id) FROM awa_email AS email INNER JOIN awa_user AS u on u.email_id = email.id INNER JOIN awa_acl AS acl ON acl.user_id = u.id INNER JOIN awa_permission AS perm ON acl.permission = perm.id INNER JOIN ado_entity_type AS ent ON acl.entity_type = ent.id WHERE email.email = :email
